text: Oh hello, didn't see you there. Welcome to How to Play Croquet. My name is Dennis
and I will be your instructor. All the necessary equipment for a game of croquet
is shown including the mallet, ball, wickets, and stake. Assemble your croquet
mallet as shown. Croquet is a game played with a ball and a mallet. The object of
the game is to hit the ball with the mallet through these little white hoops
called wickets. Once it is hit halfway around the field you must put it through
these two wickets then make it hit the stake. To begin a game of croquet you
must butt your mallet up against the stake and proceed to push the ball
through the first two wickets.
The order in which you must hit the croquet ball around the pitch is
currently being shown starting with the first two wickets in front of the stake
and outside wicket then back towards the center again to the outside and
eventually to another stake behind two wickets. Then you must mirror your
movements from before hitting it once again to the outside, the center, back to
the outside, and then eventually back in to the center.
The technique to hitting a croquet ball is extremely intricate. Grip the mallet like
you would a golf club or baseball bat with your dominant hand over your non-dominant.
Once you have addressed the angle and distance in which you would like to hit the ball, place
your feet shoulder width apart putting your center of gravity directly over the ball.
Then you must line up the ball with the center of this target and prepare to swing your mallet
back preparing for your stroke.
And there you have it.
And that dear lads is how to play
croquet ball.
Okay.
